source_brand_sanitization: do not copy Figma brand marks
do not use source event colors as identity
qa_probes: contact sheet shows product workflow before code
full arm does not resemble source brand

source_brand_sanitization: do not copy Stripe brand marks
do not copy Stripe event graphics
do not copy transcript text or product framing
qa_probes: contact sheet shows one commerce proof route
feature breadth is subordinate to the demo object

source_brand_sanitization: do not copy Google brand marks
do not copy Google Cloud stage visuals
do not use source color identity as theme
qa_probes: contact sheet shows a readable AI demo climax
enterprise scale remains visible without announcement sprawl

source_brand_sanitization: do not copy Apple brand marks
do not copy Apple UI or Liquid Glass visuals
do not imitate Apple keynote composition
qa_probes: contact sheet shows original material behavior
content remains more important than surface effect

rules: use original palette
preserve text contrast
forbid source-brand color cloning
theme_policies.qa_probe: Theme should read as Vulca/product-system original, not a reference brand.

rules: use original commerce palette
separate trust layer from demo layer
forbid Stripe color or event identity cloning
theme_policies.qa_probe: Theme should support fintech trust without resembling Stripe.

rules: use original AI platform palette
reserve high energy color for the climax object
forbid Google Cloud color or event identity cloning
theme_policies.qa_probe: Theme should make the demo climax visible without source-brand resemblance.

rules: use original material language
keep content above surface effect
forbid Apple UI, device, and Liquid Glass imitation
theme_policies.qa_probe: Theme should explain material behavior without Apple-like identity.

rules: headline at least 2.6x support label size
body lines stay short
tiny trace labels stay out of main slide
typography_systems.qa_probe: Contact sheet headline should be readable before support labels.

rules: commercial shift headline dominates product details
demo object labels stay short
financial support text routes to notes when dense
typography_systems.qa_probe: Reviewer should read the commerce proof before product breadth.

rules: demo result headline dominates infrastructure context
model and platform names are secondary
climax slide uses the largest headline scale
typography_systems.qa_probe: AI demo story should be readable at contact-sheet scale.

rules: material behavior labels stay secondary to content
design principle headline leads every slide
avoid source-like phrasing and brand-like names
typography_systems.qa_probe: Slide should explain a system principle, not imitate a source keynote.

rules: outer margin >= 54px
module gutters >= 24px
focal object has larger margin than support objects
spacing_token_sets.qa_probe: Focal object should not feel crowded or accidental.

rules: hero demo object receives at least 45 percent of slide width
supporting feature breadth uses one subordinate row or rail
gutter between demo and support context >= 32px
spacing_token_sets.qa_probe: Feature breadth should not compete with the commercial proof object.

rules: climax object receives at least 50 percent of available slide area
infrastructure context stays outside the primary focal field
proof route nodes keep consistent 24px internal spacing
spacing_token_sets.qa_probe: AI climax should feel staged, not packed.

rules: content layer has priority spacing over material layer
transparent native shapes do not overlap readable text
control layer remains visually separate from proof content
spacing_token_sets.qa_probe: Material behavior should not crowd or obscure content.
